tasks.label: WSL: install build tools
tasks.command: sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y build-essential cmake make gcc-aarch64-linux-gnu g++-aarch64-linux-gnu

tasks.label: Build: ARM smart retail
tasks.command: mkdir -p build_arm && aarch64-linux-gnu-g++ -std=c++17 -Iinclude src/catalog.cpp src/cart.cpp src/payment.cpp src/recognizer.cpp src/voice.cpp src/main.cpp -o build_arm/embed_project && file build_arm/embed_project

tasks.label: Build: ARM QR scanner
tasks.command: mkdir -p build_arm && aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc -std=c11 -O2 -Wall -Iinclude -Ilib/quirc src/qr_scanner.c lib/quirc/quirc.c lib/quirc/decode.c lib/quirc/identify.c lib/quirc/version_db.c -o build_arm/qr_scanner -lm && file build_arm/qr_scanner

tasks.label: Build: ARM QR scanner display
tasks.command: mkdir -p build_arm && aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc -std=c11 -O2 -Wall -Iinclude -Ilib/quirc src/qr_scanner_display.c lib/quirc/quirc.c lib/quirc/decode.c lib/quirc/identify.c lib/quirc/version_db.c -o build_arm/qr_scanner_display -lm && file build_arm/qr_scanner_display

tasks.label: ADB: push project
tasks.command: ADB=${ADB:-/mnt/c/tmp/RKDevTool_Release_v2.92/RKDevTool_Release_v2.92/bin/adb.exe}; "$ADB" devices && "$ADB" shell 'mkdir -p /userdata/Embed_project/bin /userdata/Embed_project/data /userdata/Embed_project/scripts' && "$ADB" push build_arm/embed_project /userdata/Embed_project/bin/embed_project && "$ADB" push build_arm/qr_scanner /userdata/Embed_project/bin/qr_scanner && "$ADB" push build_arm/qr_scanner_display /userdata/Embed_project/bin/qr_scanner_display && "$ADB" push data/products.csv /userdata/Embed_project/data/products.csv && "$ADB" push scripts/camera_preview_lvds.sh /userdata/Embed_project/scripts/camera_preview_lvds.sh && "$ADB" push scripts/qr_realtime_terminal.sh /userdata/Embed_project/scripts/qr_realtime_terminal.sh && "$ADB" push scripts/qr_realtime_lvds.sh /userdata/Embed_project/scripts/qr_realtime_lvds.sh && "$ADB" shell 'chmod +x /userdata/Embed_project/bin/embed_project /userdata/Embed_project/bin/qr_scanner /userdata/Embed_project/bin/qr_scanner_display /userdata/Embed_project/scripts/*.sh'

tasks.label: ADB: stop camera tasks
tasks.command: ADB=${ADB:-/mnt/c/tmp/RKDevTool_Release_v2.92/RKDevTool_Release_v2.92/bin/adb.exe}; "$ADB" shell 'pkill -9 gst-launch-1.0 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -9 qr_scanner 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -9 qr_scanner_display 2>/dev/null || true'
